steps.title: Use the contrast goal
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two protest songs, so the sentence must mention both songs and show how they differ. A sentence that only gives a similarity or discusses one song alone will not accomplish the goal.

steps.title: Compare both subjects
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes what the songs share. Choice C describes only Bring Him Back Home, and Choice D describes only Poor Miner's Farewell. The effective sentence contrasts their subjects: Kentucky coal miners versus Nelson Mandela and apartheid. The answer is B.
